epics.title: Deploy Full Agent Team to VM
epics.description: Deploy all agent workspaces, cron jobs, and daily automation to the VM. Foundation for everything.

epics.title: First Revenue Project
epics.description: Research, identify, and build the first revenue-generating project. Bootstrap on free resources.

epics.title: Platform Security Hardening
epics.description: Continuous security improvement across all infrastructure, code, and agent workspaces.

epics.title: Agent Requests & Add-ons
epics.description: Requests for new agents, role changes, and team additions.

epics.title: Jira Management Team
epics.description: Team dedicated to managing the Jira board. Creates issues, sets dates, applies labels, maintains board hygiene.

epics.title: Revenue & Business Development
epics.description: All revenue-generating projects, business analysis, market research, and monetization strategies.

tickets.title: Set up 24/7 monitoring for all services
tickets.description: Deploy Monitoring Agent to check gateway, voice bot, disk, memory, CPU, ports, logs every 5 min.

tickets.title: Deploy Kanban + Jira boards
tickets.description: Set up Kanban web dashboard and Jira board. Configure workflows, labels, and agent access.

tickets.title: Deploy all agent workspaces to VM
tickets.description: Run all setup scripts: setup-agent-team.sh, setup-audit-team.sh, setup-research-agent.sh, setup-business-division.sh, setup-monitoring.sh, setup-org-excellence.sh

tickets.title: Set up daily cron jobs on VM
tickets.description: Install cron: monitoring (5min), org-review (6am), research (7am), audit (8am), finance (9am), improvement (10am), data (11am), backup (11pm)

tickets.title: Identify first revenue project
tickets.description: Research and identify the first project to build for revenue. Research Agent → Business Analyst → pick opportunity → Orchestrator builds MVP.

tickets.title: Agent Request: ML Engineer needed
tickets.description: Data Engineer overloaded with ML/AI pipeline work. Need dedicated ML Engineer agent for model training and AI features.

tickets.title: Issue Creator - Create and update Jira issues
tickets.description: Create new Jira issues based on agent work requests. Ensures proper formatting, labels, and epic associations.

tickets.title: Label Manager - Apply agent labels
tickets.description: Manages label system. Ensures agent name is first label. Maintains consistency across all tickets.

tickets.title: Schedule Manager - Set dates and deadlines
tickets.description: Sets start dates and deadlines on all Jira issues. Tracks due dates and escalates overdue items.

tickets.title: Board Hygiene - Maintain board cleanliness
tickets.description: Ensures Jira board is clean and up to date. Moves tickets to correct status. Archives completed items.

tickets.title: Epic Linker - Associate issues with epics
tickets.description: Ensures all stories/tasks are linked to parent epics. Maintains epic hierarchy. Reports progress.
